items.title: OpenAI cofounder envisions "almost no interface" future where nobody learns software anymore
items.summary: Greg Brockman admits ChatGPT's plugins, heavily marketed in 2023, failed "because the models weren't ready." Instead of app extensions, he sees the future in an invisible, context-aware agent. But OpenAI's own Codex is still light-years from that vision.
